user.title: Connect Caprine
user.description: Add a Caprine desktop app notification target.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Caprine. Make sure Caprine is running and Home Assistant can reach the notification port.

abort.already_configured: This Caprine target is already configured.

send_notification.name: Send Caprine notification
send_notification.description: Send a rich notification to one or more Caprine desktop apps.

targets.name: Targets
targets.description: Optional list of Caprine config entry names or IDs. Leave empty to send to all configured Caprine targets.

url.name: URL
url.description: Optional URL to open when the notification is clicked.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: Optional icon URL or local path for the notification.

persistent.name: Persistent
persistent.description: Keep the notification visible until it is dismissed.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds before the notification closes when it is not persistent.

silent.name: Silent
silent.description: Do not play a notification sound.

id.name: Notification ID
id.description: Optional stable ID for replacing or grouping a notification.
